reporting_unit: Filing reports in USD millions (decimals=-6, scale=6 per XBRL). All monetary values multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw USD. Shares reported in millions and multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw count.

company_mapping.revenue: us-gaap:Revenues — Income statement line 'Revenue'. NVDA reports a single revenue line with no sub-components on the face.
company_mapping.cogs: us-gaap:CostOfRevenue — Income statement line 'Cost of revenue'.
company_mapping.gross_profit: us-gaap:GrossProfit — Explicitly reported on income statement face. Equals Revenue minus Cost of revenue.
company_mapping.pretax_income: us-gaap:IncomeLossFromContinuingOperationsBeforeIncomeTaxesExtraordinaryItemsNoncontrollingInterest — Income statement line 'Income before income tax'.
company_mapping.income_tax_expense: us-gaap:IncomeTaxExpenseBenefit — Income statement line 'Income tax expense (benefit)'.
company_mapping.net_income: us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss — Income statement and cash flow statement starting line. Cross-statement check confirms IS equals CF starting line. NVDA has no noncontrolling interest; consolidated net income equals parent net income.
company_mapping.interest_expense: us-gaap:InterestExpenseNonoperating — Income statement line 'Interest expense'. This is the gross interest expense line (247 for FY2025). The filing separately discloses interest income (us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest) and interest expense as separate line items under Other income (expense), net, so this is already gross. Normalized to negative per policy: -247 million raw = -247000000.
company_mapping.sbc: us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensation — Cash flow statement addback 'Stock-based compensation expense'. Cross-statement check confirms 4,737 matches IS note total.
company_mapping.dna: us-gaap:DepreciationDepletionAndAmortization — Cash flow statement addback 'Depreciation and amortization'. Single line captures all D&A. Value: 1,864 million for FY2025.
company_mapping.diluted_shares: us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberOfDilutedSharesOutstanding — Income statement line 'Diluted weighted average shares'. Reported in millions; converted to raw count.
company_mapping.cash: us-gaap:CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue — Balance sheet line 'Cash and cash equivalents'.
company_mapping.short_term_investments: us-gaap:MarketableSecuritiesCurrent — Balance sheet line 'Marketable securities'. NVDA classifies short-term marketable securities here.
company_mapping.accounts_receivable: us-gaap:AccountsReceivableNetCurrent — Balance sheet line 'Accounts receivable, net'. Pure trade AR; no combined account.
company_mapping.inventory: us-gaap:InventoryNet — Balance sheet line 'Inventories'. Breakdown available in XBRL notes (raw materials, WIP, finished goods) but face value used here.
company_mapping.accounts_payable: us-gaap:AccountsPayableCurrent — Balance sheet line 'Accounts payable'. Separate line from accrued liabilities; pure trade AP.
company_mapping.equity: us-gaap:StockholdersEquity — Balance sheet line 'Total shareholders equity'. NVDA has no noncontrolling interest; this is parent-only equity.
company_mapping.short_term_debt: us-gaap:DebtCurrent — Balance sheet line 'Short-term debt'. For FY2025 (Jan 26 2025) = 0. For FY2024 (Jan 28 2024) = 1,250 million. Confirmed by xbrl_not_on_statement us-gaap:LongTermDebtCurrent showing same values.
company_mapping.long_term_debt: us-gaap:LongTermDebtNoncurrent — Balance sheet line 'Long-term debt'. Value: 8,463 million.
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities: Current portion: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent from xbrl_not_on_statement (aggregated into Accrued and other current liabilities on BS face) — 288 million (FY2025), 228 million (FY2024). Non-current: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent from balance sheet face — 1,519 million (FY2025), 1,119 million (FY2024). Total FY2025 = 288 + 1,519 = 1,807 million. Total FY2024 = 228 + 1,119 = 1,347 million. No double counting as current is embedded in accrued liabilities line and non-current is a separate BS line.
company_mapping.cfo: us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInOperatingActivities — Cash flow statement line 'Net cash provided by operating activities'.
company_mapping.capex: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireProductiveAssets — Cash flow statement line 'Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets'. NVDA uses this broader concept (PPE plus intangibles together). Normalized to negative per policy: -3,236 million raw = -3236000000.
company_mapping.acquisitions: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireBusinessesNetOfCashAcquired — Cash flow statement line 'Acquisitions, net of cash acquired'. Normalized to negative per policy: -1,007 million raw = -1007000000.
company_mapping.rd_expense: us-gaap:ResearchAndDevelopmentExpense — Income statement line 'Research and development'.
company_mapping.current_operating_lease_liabilities: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent from xbrl_not_on_statement. Embedded within Accrued and other current liabilities on BS face.
company_mapping.noncurrent_operating_lease_liabilities: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent — Balance sheet face line 'Long-term operating lease liabilities'.
company_mapping.cash_paid_for_interest: us-gaap:InterestPaidNet — Supplemental cash flow disclosure. Used for Metric 21 Unlevered FCF calculation.
company_mapping.inventory_raw_materials: us-gaap:InventoryRawMaterialsNetOfReserves from xbrl_not_on_statement — balance sheet components note.
company_mapping.inventory_wip: us-gaap:InventoryWorkInProcessNetOfReserves from xbrl_not_on_statement — balance sheet components note.
company_mapping.inventory_finished_goods: us-gaap:InventoryFinishedGoodsNetOfReserves from xbrl_not_on_statement — balance sheet components note.
company_mapping.sg_and_a: us-gaap:SellingGeneralAndAdministrativeExpense — Income statement line 'Sales, general and administrative'.
company_mapping.interest_income: us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest — Income statement line 'Interest income'. Reported separately from interest expense.
company_mapping.segment_operating_income_compute_and_net: ComputeAndNetworkingSegmentMember operating income from segment data.
company_mapping.segment_operating_income_graphics: GraphicsSegmentMember operating income from segment data.
company_mapping.revenue_data_center: DataCenterMember from ProductOrServiceAxis revenue segment data.
company_mapping.revenue_gaming: GamingMember from ProductOrServiceAxis revenue segment data.
company_mapping.revenue_professional_visualization: ProfessionalVisualizationMember from ProductOrServiceAxis revenue segment data.
company_mapping.revenue_automotive: AutomotiveMember from ProductOrServiceAxis revenue segment data.
company_mapping.revenue_oem_and_other: OEMAndOtherMember from ProductOrServiceAxis revenue segment data.
